title: Coverage sweep: original VAMS UI -> implementable spec (v1)
note: SUPERSEDED -- built against the wrong commit (the broken/partial omarbinghalib/VAMS `main` upload). A v2 reconciliation against the confirmed true original (6a68f9c on VAMS2.0) is in flight -- see Foundation lane 5 below.

title: Source-of-truth arbitration: which VAMS codebase is the true VBG-deployed original
note: MAJOR FINDING. omarbinghalib/VAMS `main` is a BROKEN PARTIAL UPLOAD: 12 apps in strict alphabetical order (accounts->cmtr), cut off mid-alphabet, only 9.8% production-table coverage -- unusable as a reference. The TRUE VBG-deployed original is commit 6a68f9c on branch VAMS2.0: 112 apps, 98.5% (effectively 100%) production-table coverage, pinned Django 1.6.10 + South 0.8.4 -- proven by 1,527 rows in production's south_migrationhistory (South only existed pre-Django-1.7). The VAMS2.0 tip is a dependency-upgraded version that was NEVER deployed (phase1-django1.8 ... phase5-django32 + code-rewrite all merged in; py312/django42 requirements ladder) -- its base requirements.txt still misleadingly says Django 1.6.10. Omar's pristine production dump (Jun_30_Tue_23_00.sql.gz) and vams_monolith have identical 564-table sets -- zero drift -- independently validating our whole migration source. Employee-facing stack to match: Bootstrap 2.3.1/2.3.2 + 3.2.0/3.3.1 mixed, jQuery 1.x, Angular 1.3.15.

title: Restore pristine Jun-30 prod dump -> new DB vams_original_pristine; validate ETL counts
note: Restoring Jun_30_Tue_23_00.sql.gz (Omar's pristine production dump) into its own DB and cross-checking ETL counts, independently confirming migration-source integrity.

title: Root-cause audit: acme->vams schema-rename load-completeness gaps
note: All 0-row/1-row table gaps traced to one mechanism: service DBs originally loaded ETL into an 'acme' schema, later renamed wholesale to 'vams' by deploy_vams_tenant.py. Any table/spec not executed during that original 'acme' run sat empty in 'vams'. Fix everywhere = re-running the existing (already-correct) loaders with ETL_TARGET_SCHEMA=vams -- these were load-completeness gaps, not missing functionality.
